_description: Reference: canonical page-block shape for `type: 'rich_text'`. Two valid shapes — raw HTML in data.html OR Tiptap JSON in data.content. Added 2026-04-24 after the Unavis report hit a silent-fail with data.text (wrong field name).
_validated_by: ContentBlock @model_validator — type='rich_text' REQUIRES data.html or data.content
_anti_pattern: {type: 'rich_text', data: {text: '...'}} — returns 422 since 2026-04-24. Pick one of the two shapes below.
